pairs.py:
def count_zero(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose value is zero."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v == 0: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def sum_edge_weights(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the weights of all edges reachable from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        for tgt, w in adj.get(n, []):
            acc += w
            stack.append(tgt)
    return acc

def min_over_positive(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the smallest positive value among reachable nodes, or -1 if none."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = -1
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v > 0 and (best == -1 or v < best): best = v
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

def toll_trip_balance(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Walk the chain of towns adding each gain and paying each road toll; return the final balance."""
    gains = spec["gains"]
    tolls = spec["tolls"]
    bal = 0
    i = 0
    while i < len(gains):
        bal += gains[i]
        if i < len(tolls):
            bal -= tolls[i]
        i += 1
    return bal
